main.name: Saurabh Jadhav
main.description: 6+ years of experience building enterprise-grade applications with Java, Spring Boot, React, and Angular.
main.bio: I'm a Senior Full-Stack Developer with over 6 years of experience delivering scalable enterprise solutions. Currently at Wipro Limited, I build healthcare applications for UnitedHealth Group (Optum) using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, and REST APIs. I'm passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and solving complex business problems through technology.
main.contactmessage: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Let's connect.

resume.skillmessage: I bring a strong command of both frontend and backend technologies, delivering end-to-end solutions across the full software development lifecycle.

education.degree: PG-DAC (Post Graduate Diploma in Advanced Computing)
education.description: Completed with Distinction — 74.00% (A+). Coursework: Web Technologies, Database (SQL/NoSQL), Object-Oriented Programming.

education.school: Pune Institute of Computer Technology (PICT), University of Pune
education.description: Graduated with Distinction — 68.00%. Coursework: Data Structures, Operating Systems, DBMS, Networking, Linux.

work.title: Senior Developer
work.description: Building enterprise healthcare applications for UnitedHealth Group (Optum). Full-stack development using Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, and Angular. Designed backend APIs, database integrations, and frontend components for LINX PLM. Active in Agile/Scrum ceremonies, code reviews, sprint planning, and production support.

work.title: Full-Stack Developer
work.description: Delivered backend modules for Capex Cockpit and Lease Abstraction Tool using Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, JavaScript, and jQuery. Built proposal, task, settings, and authentication modules. Handled production issues and client deployments.

work.title: Frontend Developer
work.description: Developed modern UIs using React JS, Next.js, and Redux. Built reusable component libraries and client-facing screens with responsive design.

work.title: Java Full-Stack Developer
work.description: Worked on Spring Boot microservices, REST APIs, and React JS frontends. Delivered feature development, API refactoring, and resolved production issues. Set up CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments.
